rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious SharePoint Query
id: 634cb49d-2509-4dfd-abb5-a592d9b63810
description: Searching for sensitive files on SharePoint, might indicate an attacker
  looking for sensitive data.
status: test
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: 2024-04-02
modified: 2024-05-24
logsource:
  product: azure
  service: sharepoint
detection:
  selection:
    Operation|cased: SearchQueryPerformed
    SearchQueryText|contains:
    - password
    - kdbx
    - backup
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Likely. Check IP reputation, do log/alert correlation to look for other suspicious
  activity
level: medium
